title: Mildly Grassy Italian Zucchini Tagliatelle
description: A keto-friendly one-pot Italian dish featuring tahini paste and leaf-wrap-steam, with a grassy and glassy-jelly texture, served as tagliatelle.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the spiralized zucchini and cook for 3 minutes until slightly tender.
Add the tahini paste, lemon juice, chicken broth, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes until the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the chopped parsley and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Use a leaf wrap to steam the tagliatelle for 2 minutes until cooked through.
Serve the Mildly Grassy Italian Zucchini Tagliatelle hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
